case_title: REBECCA TACOSAGRAY,CALIFORNIA VS. DAVID L JOHNSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B) AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-18-2017 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-15-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-05-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-28-2017 CONTINUED TO APR-18-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); FAILURE TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TACOSAGRAY,CALIFORNIA, REBECCA AURORAMAJOR/THESLEEPINGBEAUTY, EXACT AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DAVID L. U.S. FBI SAN FRANCISCO LISA OF THE MODESTO POLICE DEPARTMENT THE ESTABLISHMENT SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-05-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-05-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-12-2016

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TACOSAGRAY,CALIFORNIA, REBECCA AURORAMAJOR/THESLEEPINGBEAUTY, EXACT ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-15-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST REBECCA TACOSAGRAY,CALIFORNIA, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-28-2017, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-16-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-18-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-18-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-15-2016 CONTINUED TO FEB-28-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-18-2017 CONTINUED TO JUL-18-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST REBECCA TACOSAGRAY,CALIFORNIA, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-18-2017, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-04-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST REBECCA TACOSAGRAY,CALIFORNIA FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-15-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-02-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-28-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by or on behalf of Plaintiff. Case Dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608 (b). Judge: James Robertson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2017 Continued To Jul-18-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to July 18, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2016 Continued To Feb-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to FEB-28-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)
